title: Load and walk the tree
description: A project owner or an AI tool loads the whole RCF tree from on-disk files in one operation, producing a single validated in-memory view for later commands.
iWant: to load the whole RCF tree from the on-disk files in one operation
soThat: every later command works against a single, validated in-memory view of the project

acceptanceCriteria.description: Loading reads the manifest roots and resolves every child by walking parent id lists
acceptanceCriteria.then: the manifest roots are read and every child is resolved by walking the parent id lists

acceptanceCriteria.description: Missing or unparseable files are reported as structured errors and do not crash the load
acceptanceCriteria.given: a document file that is missing or unparseable
acceptanceCriteria.then: the load reports a structured error naming the document id and the file path, and does not crash

acceptanceCriteria.description: Broken references are reported as part of project health, not swallowed
acceptanceCriteria.given: a reference to a document id that has no file
acceptanceCriteria.then: the broken reference is reported as part of project health, not swallowed
